tweets.text: Diwali represents hope and renewal. Today, we wish all who celebrate a joyous day filled with community, reflection, happinesses, and prosperity. https://t.co/i8v16L6BQF

.@SecBlinken holds a press availability with @SecDef Austin, Republic of Korea Minister of Foreign Affairs Cho Tae-yul, and Republic of Korea Minister of Defense Kim Yong-hyun at the State Department. https://t.co/Xnz6OMThfN
Wishing a safe and fun Halloween to all trick-or-treaters worldwide. 🎃 https://t.co/5aR0TMzJMD

From U.S. high school students studying in Germany to Fortune 500 executives mentoring emerging women in STEM from Tunisia, @ECAatState programs bring people together to connect, share experiences, and build a better world. 🌍 Learn more: https://t.co/ubIdlqhY0k https://t.co/6Y94dzGhv3

.@SecBlinken put it best, “It’s our privilege to do all we can to leave this Department stronger than we found it so that when we pass the baton to those who follow, they can grab it and run even further ahead.” 8/8 https://t.co/YnhB45UruJ
We’re determined to make sure that talented people from all walks of life see the State Department as a place where they can belong and they can thrive. 7/8 https://t.co/58IonuJ7xo

Our diversity as a nation — in backgrounds and experiences, in race, religion, ethnicity, in countries of origin — is among our greatest competitive advantages in the world. 6/8 https://t.co/I2koJAnfCs
We’re responsibly managing our competition with the People’s Republic of China (PRC) and advancing our shared vision for an open, inclusive Indo-Pacific. 5/8 https://t.co/nUfFgO7Q4K

Critically, we were able to lead a global response that helped the world emerge from the acute phase of the COVID-19 pandemic and continued to lead on global health security to prevent future pandemics. 4/8 https://t.co/looVnqRGjN

We have a major stake in shaping the digital revolution that’s happening around us and making sure that it serves our people, protects our interests, boosts our competitiveness, and upholds our values. 3/8 https://t.co/VIj5wyEB8j

Modernization means we’re equipping the Department’s people with essential tools, resources, and expertise necessary to deal effectively with the most significant challenges before us and meet the needs and aspirations of the people we serve. 2/8 https://t.co/kgtflE2w5k

Over the past three years, we have modernized the purpose and institution of American diplomacy.

Here is a look at how we are getting stronger, more diverse, and more effective. 1/8 🧵 https://t.co/qPOoFzKOCU

.@SecBlinken delivers remarks on American Diplomacy for a New Era at 
@FSIatState. https://t.co/prtWjel6h9

.@StateDeptSpox on Georgia’s Parliamentary Elections: “We join calls from international and local observers for a full investigation of all reports of election related violations — and urge respect for the fundamental freedoms of expression and peaceful assembly.” https://t.co/4i7LKorZ57
.@SecBlinken and Commerce @SecRaimondo deliver remarks on the economic benefits of U.S travel and tourism, at the State Department. https://t.co/XFvvpLlssm

Earlier this month in Laos, @SecBlinken heard from young leaders about their work addressing critical challenges and expanding opportunities in their communities. Lou, Catdy, and April are alums of @yseali  who are making tomorrow a brighter day. https://t.co/LX5VoDs41j
We’ve been working hard to modernize the State Department, embracing innovation and technology to power U.S. diplomacy. And as @DepSecStateMR explains, we’re not done yet. https://t.co/qhBs30QBmh

This week at State, @SecBlinken travels to Israel, Egypt, Qatar, and the UK to discuss paths forward for advancing peace and security in the Middle East. Also this week, Secretary Blinken honors this year’s Global Anti-Racism Champions. https://t.co/o16mxqZRnI

On this anniversary of the International Religious Freedom Act, we honor those who protect the freedom of religion or belief for everyone and recognize that many still face persecution for their religion or belief. https://t.co/KPKokKe3ws

Finally, @SecBlinken and UAE Foreign Minister @ABZayed discussed a vision for governance, security, and reconstruction for lasting peace for Israelis and Palestinians in the post-conflict period. The Secretary commended the UAE’s humanitarian support for Lebanon and Gaza. https://t.co/hHJa5mgRNn

The Secretary and Jordanian Foreign Minister @AymanHsafadi discussed ongoing efforts to de-escalate regional tensions and reaffirmed the critical need for additional food, medicine, and humanitarian aid to be delivered to the people of Gaza. https://t.co/SFGUIwRopf

In his meeting with Lebanese Caretaker Prime Minister Mikati, @SecBlinken emphasized the United States' commitment to a diplomatic resolution and reiterated support for the Lebanese government and its sovereign institutions.

.@SecBlinken’s last stop was in London, where he met with officials from Lebanon, Jordan, and the UAE to continue discussions on ending the war in Gaza and achieving a diplomatic resolution to allow citizens on both sides of the Blue Line to return home.

Recap⬇️:

The U.S. is committed to conserving nature at home and halting biodiversity loss worldwide — while upholding Indigenous rights. Follow @SciDiplomacyUSA to learn how the U.S. plans to conserve 30% of U.S. lands and waters by 2030. #COP16Colombia https://t.co/4PKiugahwR

These phenomenal civil society leaders demonstrate extraordinary courage, strength, leadership, and commitment in the fight against racism and discrimination. This year’s Global #AntiracismChampions share their advice for creating a better world. https://t.co/3zSWoAfi8a

“The rhythm of the human heart is the same everywhere.” That’s how jazz pianist Dave Brubeck described music's power to connect people. For decades the U.S. has enlisted American musicians to promote peace and forge global connections. Learn more: https://t.co/BLUOanduOp

We are proud to honor icon, philanthropist, and 10-time @RecordingAcad GRAMMY winner @DollyParton with the 2024 PEACE Through Music Award. Her timeless music and philanthropic efforts continue to bridge divides and promote peace worldwide. #MusicDiplomacy https://t.co/Rg56ggkKfq
Throughout his visit, the Secretary emphasized the United States’ gratitude for Qatar’s crucial role and partnership in advancing peace, stability, and progress throughout the region.

After his meeting with @MBA_AlThani_, the Secretary announced the United States was providing more than $135 million in humanitarian assistance for Palestinians in Gaza, the West Bank, and across the region for water, sanitation, and maternal health. https://t.co/jq39kkLp01

Next, the Secretary met with Qatari Prime Minister and Foreign Minister @MBA_AlThani_ to discuss ensuring the conflict in Gaza not only ends, but does not spread more broadly. They spoke about efforts to promote a diplomatic resolution in Lebanon that would allow both Israeli and Lebanese civilians to return home.
The Secretary and Qatari Amir @TamimBinHamad discussed these renewed efforts as well as ongoing work to provide security, governance, and reconstruction in Gaza after the war. https://t.co/wQ99ucrjLU

While in Doha today, @SecBlinken met with officials to discuss efforts to capitalize on this moment to end the conflict in Gaza, bring the hostages home, and build a better future for the Palestinian people.

Here’s the daily recap: https://t.co/QcDH1HWKhE

It’s essential that we continue to develop a plan for what follows so that Israel can withdraw from Gaza, so that Hamas cannot reconstitute, and so that the Palestinian people can rebuild their lives and rebuild their futures under Palestinian leadership. — @SecBlinken https://t.co/TIgn3M8MBE

Today, we're announcing an additional $135 million dollars in humanitarian assistance — water, sanitation, maternal health — for Palestinians in Gaza as well as in the region. - @SecBlinken from Doha, Qatar. https://t.co/ftdOSuE02G

Today, on #UNDay, we celebrate the United States’ commitment to global cooperation through the @UN. From advancing human rights to driving sustainable development, 🇺🇸 is proud to partner with the UN to build a better, more prosperous world for all. https://t.co/3brZfmpwE3 https://t.co/ICMRGhNj4s

.@SecBlinken holds a joint press availability with Qatari Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Mohammed bin Abdulrahman Al Thani in Doha, Qatar. https://t.co/kihGazGNQE
 https://t.co/yk53imSWDe
.@SecBlinken ended the day by dropping by the embassy to meet with our colleagues and families at @USAinKSA, as well our U.S. Mission to Yemen. https://t.co/LPZF4YQI3f

The Secretary then met with Crown Prince and Prime Minister Mohammed bin Salman Al Saud. They discussed the need to create lasting regional stability including efforts to reach a diplomatic solution in Lebanon and end the conflict in Sudan. https://t.co/Ekozff4hb7

The Secretary began his day with a meeting with Saudi Arabia’s Foreign Minister Prince Faisal bin Farhan Al Saud. During their conversation, they discussed how to establish security, governance, and reconstruction in the post-conflict period in Gaza. https://t.co/xBdTGOn2Xm
Today, @SecBlinken was in Saudi Arabia to continue discussions on advancing peace and security across the region.

Congratulations to @BankofAmerica India, Koster Keunen, @Microsoft Colombia, @NewmontCorp, @parkerclay, and Rizome. @DeputySecState presented them with the Award for Corporate Excellence for driving positive change globally through corporate social responsibility and innovation. https://t.co/bK6fIHm9lg
Tanya Duarte, Global Anti-Racism Champion from Mexico, shares why we need to raise our voices against institutional racism – to give voice to future generations. https://t.co/7ydUq7wFlb

The courage of these honorees, of the causes and the communities that they represent - this is the most powerful antidote to hate, to despair, to hateful acts, to hardened hearts. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/8HlVqYUGGl

At the end of the day, the Secretary met with Israeli President Herzog where the pair discussed ongoing efforts to de-escalate tensions in the region and to promote a diplomatic resolution along the Blue Line that will allow civilians on both sides of the border to return to their homes.

The Secretary then met with Israeli Defense Minister Gallant. In the meeting, he reaffirmed the United States’ ironclad commitment to Israel’s security and to deterring further regional aggression from Iran and its proxies. https://t.co/MkVYrNMrcr

The Secretary began his day meeting with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu. The two leaders discussed the importance of seizing this opportunity to chart a path towards lasting peace and security for Israelis and Palestinians alike. https://t.co/MtNcK8Hdr0

.@SecBlinken has concluded the first day of his trip to the Middle East with a stop in Israel. In his meeting with officials, he discussed the importance of bringing the war in Gaza to an end, securing the release of all hostages, and alleviating the suffering of the Palestinian people.

Here’s a recap.

Established in 1741, the Bethlehem Moravian Church Settlement has been designated the first transnational World Heritage Site in the United States. International cooperation through @UNESCO helps protect cultural and natural heritage in the U.S. and abroad. https://t.co/W0p7gBiJ2q
.@DeputySecState Campbell delivers remarks at the 2024 Secretary of State’s Award for Corporate Excellence ceremony. #SecStateACE  https://t.co/MVaIfC21tL
Congratulations to the awardees for their advocacy and courage in advancing human rights and combatting discrimination in their countries. https://t.co/owjcfQqVnE

Today, we recognized six civil society leaders from around the world as Global #AntiracismChampions. These human rights defenders have worked tirelessly to fight against structural racism, discrimination, and xenophobia. https://t.co/be1zVIiSpT https://t.co/04UBuAaEEk

When individuals see themselves represented in their governments, that in turn enhances their faith in democratic institutions. If every community has access to opportunity, that boosts a nation’s economic strength and its potential. — @SecBlinken at #GARC2024 https://t.co/WIlxBaNymH
.@SecBlinken delivers remarks at the second annual ceremony for the Secretary of State’s Award for Global Anti-Racism Champions, at the State Department. #GARC2024 https://t.co/MMNKAH1M71

America and Germany are the two largest supporters of Ukraine in its fight for survival as a free and independent nation. As Ukraine faces a tough winter, we must sustain our resolve, our effort, and our support. —@POTUS https://t.co/zVlBpudqFd

The United States and Germany are partners in addressing the most pressing global challenges, including assisting Ukraine in its defense against the Kremlin’s aggression, strengthening democratic resilience, collaboration in space, and accelerating the clean energy transition. https://t.co/p81MDA4lYL

On October 18, 2024 in Berlin, German President President Frank-Walter Steinmeier awards President Joe Biden Germany's highest honor, the Order of Merit, for his dedication to the transatlantic alliance. https://t.co/JJujyaokyb

Support for Ukraine will endure because it doesn't depend on any one country. Our collective message to Putin is clear: Our support will not wane, our unity will not break. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/Mx0vIHFjRe
We cannot grow weary, we cannot look away, and we will not let up on our support for Ukraine, not until Ukraine wins of just endurable peace. — @POTUS https://t.co/8a9MIBKKVs

After a long day, who doesn’t love tacos? From street taco spots in Mexico City to media interviews in New York City, our Spanish Language Spokesperson Natalia Molano shares how food and language help her do her job and to connect with people around the world. https://t.co/MUbSbO6h43

With climate change and conflict, global food systems are under unprecedented stress. Earlier this year, @SecBlinken visited Africa Rice and saw how they're using genetic science to develop more resilient grain varieties. Advancements like this are more important than ever. https://t.co/l8YkvF3IMr

Food security means having enough safe and nutritious food to support an active, healthy life. The current food crisis can destabilize societies, increase hunger & malnutrition, drive migration & conflict, and cause severe economic dislocation. Learn more: https://t.co/4JjSwhukdX

Hispanic Americans make communities across the United States stronger. 

As we close out #HispanicHeritageMonth from September 15 - October 15, test your knowledge of Hispanic Americans’ influence and impact: https://t.co/xIxbc9p2Tb

During #HispanicHeritageMonth, we celebrate the many ways the Hispanic community contributes to our culture. Hear from these muralists who use art to give voice to diverse stories from across the United States. https://t.co/1iQuDu6Vjq

Today, on Indigenous People’s Day, we honor the rich cultures, histories, and contributions of Indigenous peoples across the world. We are committed to uplifting Indigenous voices and working toward an inclusive society for all. https://t.co/TaAcfALq1k https://t.co/70qL6b1ehk
This week at State, we pause to remember the October 7, 2023, attacks on Israel and @SecBlinken travels to Laos to meet with Indo-Pacific leaders. https://t.co/ULHLd4q7VA

We’re creating a space for more diversity, inclusion, and accessibility for all.

By introducing live ASL interpretation to our Department Press Briefings, we’re ensuring the Deaf and Hard of Hearing communities have more access to critical news and timely information. https://t.co/TjpzfcyWK7

Women are one of the biggest sources of untapped potential for economic growth. The U.S. is committed to equipping women with practical skills, like Maryna Hanol, a Ukrainian refugee & alum of @USEmbPortugal's Academy for Women Entrepreneurs, who talks with @State_E Fernandez. https://t.co/JrOtiBCVtg

If you’re a U.S. citizen or legal permanent resident who is still trying to depart Lebanon, we are here to help. Please fill out this intake form: https://t.co/CXuS2ETFW7

As we look at the part of the world where there is extraordinary growth, energy, and innovation, it’s in the Indo-Pacific. And that is why we continue to strengthen our ties and deepen our engagement with ASEAN and East Asia countries. https://t.co/zwcUCKr49D
Wishing all those observing Yom Kippur an easy fast. G'mar chatima tova. https://t.co/JDRGbOkUTA

We continue to support Americans who seek to depart or relocate within Lebanon, due to the volatile situation. We urge U.S. citizens to take advantage of available departure options now. Complete the form for assistance in Lebanon and learn more: https://t.co/oUj7XZ2GuV https://t.co/qZpz0tduSd

The U.S. is committed to ensuring that girls can pursue their dreams free from fear, discrimination, violence, or abuse; and to advancing the safety, education, health, and wellbeing of girls everywhere. https://t.co/QX9101cmK7
Today on International #DayoftheGirl, we applaud girls and young women around the world who are breaking barriers and leading the way to a brighter future. https://t.co/ii3k1dqzVM
.@DepSecStateMR Verma was in Iowa this week to discuss how local leaders and communities shape the work the State Department does around the world.
On Secretary Blinken’s first day in Vientiane, Lao People's Democratic Republic, he continued to strengthen U.S. ties with ASEAN nations. https://t.co/nYHeCuAFWH

.@WhiteHouse @PressSec provides an update on how we are supporting Americans who seek to depart or relocate within Lebanon. We are working around the clock, providing as many options as possible to depart and offering loans to U.S. citizens who need assistance. https://t.co/7rPeHbGK1t

@SciDiplomacyUSA @State_E Happy 50th anniversary to @SciDiplomacyUSA. Over the past five decades, the OES Bureau has built international cooperation to address environmental challenges and promote scientific discovery. Here’s to many more years of diplomacy for people and the planet!

ASEAN is at the heart of the United States Indo-Pacific Strategy. Through our partnership, we’re elevating our work – together – to tackle the biggest challenges like cybersecurity, public health, and women’s empowerment. https://t.co/EOyx7e2kHw

The State Department continues to work 24/7 to assist U.S. citizens, their immediate family members, and Lawful Permanent Residents in Lebanon with options to depart. Fill out the crisis intake form here: https://t.co/CXuS2ETFW7 https://t.co/xVr7JYNJuH

ASEAN’s centrality and our partnership is critical to maintaining a free and open Indo-Pacific region. To further strengthen our critical partnerships in Southeast Asia, @SecBlinken will travel to Vientiane, Lao PDR to represent the U.S. at the East Asia Summit. https://t.co/8X8oQboggY
.@StateDeptSpox marks the devastating and tragic anniversary of the October 7th attack by Hamas in Israel. https://t.co/uK3syY3fPq

COVID-19 and other outbreaks of disease, like mpox, show us why health security is national security. Diplomacy is an essential tools for trying to mobilize political will, raise awareness, and unblock obstacles that hinder collaboration https://t.co/AJiWJk5i54

This week at State, we discuss ongoing efforts to defeat ISIS, convene partners on countering ransomware, and announce the launch of American Sign Language interpretation at our Daily Press Briefing. https://t.co/MvvPaqT4gh

Collaboration on space benefits all of us. We’ve seen that most recently with the launch of the James Webb Space Telescope and the landing of a rover on Mars – both projects that were made possible by international partnership and international collaboration. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/IoxGOz6111

Science fiction is becoming jaw-dropping fact, largely thanks to collaboration among many nations. Launch into a real-life space adventure with @MarkHamill , who played Luke Skywalker in Star Wars: https://t.co/2yQJF9aQyo https://t.co/Cl9a6H1MiO

Through the Artemis program, the U.S. is building the broadest and most diverse human space exploration coalition in history with international partners. Learn about the first moon landing and collaboration on future space missions: https://t.co/QdrLiHQO7f

The U.S. is working together with partners across the Western Hemisphere to deliver solutions to the complex and ongoing challenges of irregular migration – including lack of economic opportunity in home communities and other root causes. https://t.co/Eehg9N513h

Space unites us all. Through the Artemis Accords, we are working with a coalition of more than 40 nations and @NASA to chart the way forward for peaceful cooperation in space. #WorldSpaceWeek https://t.co/GaKUFFxCWz

Music, the arts, and culture are great connectors — transcending borders, language, and cultures. As we mark one year of @ECAatState's  Global Music Diplomacy Initiative, here's a throwback of @SecBlinken speaking about the power of music. https://t.co/dAbvDXN38Z

Now is a great time for Americans to apply for or renew a U.S. passport. 🛂

With faster processing times for both online and paper applications, head to https://t.co/iv1PehlNZs to ensure you’re ready for your next international trip. https://t.co/QIPByvCbPk

We are working 24/7 to help provide U.S. citizens in Lebanon with as many options as possible to depart. Americans in Lebanon should visit https://t.co/CXuS2ET86z to fill out our intake form so we can ensure that they are aware of all their options. https://t.co/tc8ma7gLdw
The State Department extends Rosh Hashanah greetings to all who are celebrating the Jewish New Year and the High Holy Days. Shanah tovah! https://t.co/YMMn627PO2

As of today, our Daily Press Briefings will include American Sign Language interpretation. This action underscores our commitment to inclusion and our acknowledgement that all individuals are integral to the fabric of our country and our workforce. https://t.co/hGwDDOZN5j

The U.S. is excited about AI’s potential. In the latest From The Secretary’s Desk, @SecBlinken details how we are working with partners to make AI safe, secure, and trustworthy, while also working with partners to share it equitably to improve lives. https://t.co/e5jHJJyEh9

The Maduro regime may try to obscure the results, but the Venezuelan people have spoken. Now, our job is to ensure their voices are heard. — @SecBlinken addresses the U.S.’s regional and international efforts to respond to the urgent situation in Venezuela. https://t.co/dt5WdripcZ
